system.flavor: You lay a trap for your foe, striking when they overextend themselves.
system.effect:
Effect places with an ally in range.
Effect your ally was adjacent to at least one foe, you may then deal 2 damage to one of those foes after swapping and daze them.
Effect damage to 1d3+1 if your ally was bloodied, or 1d6+1 if your ally was in crisis.
